citation.description: Section 'Attestation, freshness & invalidation' (L357-421) covers the five invalidation axes (certified, code-HEAD drift, material fingerprint, reopen post-dating, registry stamp, pins), the numbered invalidation list at L365-375, and the currency rule as one expression at L412-416, plus re-gate guidance at L420-421.

criteria.criterion: docs/ attestation-lifecycle page states the boolean currency rule + what invalidates + re-gate guidance

citation.description: Section '### `audit show` is a history view, not a status view' explicitly states the plan_reviews array is newest-first REVIEW_RESULT sidecar history, not the current signed attestation, and instructs use of --status for current approval.

criteria.criterion: audit show help/docs state history-not-status + newest-first

citation.description: --check argument help string reads: 'print backend/credential availability and exit; does NOT inspect a ticket's attestation status (for that, use --status)'

criteria.criterion: --check help disclaims attestation inspection and points to --status
